text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two key tasks in computer vision are image recognition, where a computer identifies what an image shows, and object detection, which locates and labels specific objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, they are used in security systems to recognise faces and in healthcare to analyse medical scans. Perhaps most famously, computer vision powers self-driving cars, allowing them to detect pedestrians, other vehicles, and road signs in real time, helping the car navigate safely without human input.
